title: Some Mods I use
description: Some Mods That Adds More Fun, a beautiful Look, And Some Mechanics To Minecraft.
body: This Modpack Adds a Beatuiful Look With Rethinking Voxels Shader, And Fun Content With Some Mods Like Clay Soldiers, And Some QoL Mods Like 3rd Person Model, Not Enought Animations, Passable Foliage And More!
